name: Skillet Pizza Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 oz No Yolks® egg noodle substitute, uncooked
25 slices reduced fat turkey pepperoni, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the egg noodle substitute according to package directions.
2. In a skillet, combine chicken, bell peppers, and onions. Cook until chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in noodles, pepperoni, and pizza sauce. Cook until heated through.
4. Sprinkle with cheese. Cover and let stand until cheese has melted.
